title: Remove Version Number from Gameplay View
summary: Version number during gameplay is developer-facing noise. Remove from gameplay, keep visible only in How to Play modal or similar.

tasks.description: Remove the v1.0 div from the gameplay info panel. Optionally add it to the How to Play modal footer.
acceptance_criteria: No version number visible during gameplay
Version number visible somewhere accessible (How to Play or settings)

testing_focus: Gameplay screen has no version text
